top_tweets.text:
every single ai product:

"we've built revolutionary tech that changes your life using artificial intelligence

so say you have a spreadsheet...."
top_tweets.author: thdxr
top_tweets.name: dax
top_tweets.summary_zh: 諷刺所有 AI 產品的行銷套路：宣稱用尖端 AI 改變生活，結果示範場景都是處理試算表這類平凡任務。對 PM 在定位 AI 產品價值主張時是個提醒。

top_tweets.text: Coinbase is in a death loop where they aren't making enough money, so they need to layoff more, replace engineers with PMs using AI, they dont know how to scale infra or do any engineering, which creates a worse product with zero reliability, and theyre making even less money...
top_tweets.author: aaalexhl
top_tweets.name: aaalex.hl
top_tweets.summary_zh: 批評 Coinbase 陷入惡性循環：因營收不足裁員、用 AI 取代工程師改派 PM，導致基礎建設能力下降、產品可靠性變差、營收更少。反映組織設計與技術投資的取捨風險。

top_tweets.text:
Building voice applications with GPT-Realtime-2?

Our new prompting guide covers how to tune reasoning effort, use preambles, design tool behavior, handle unclear audio, capture exact entities, and maintain state in longer sessions.

https://t.co/9zfdhIX4Vq
top_tweets.author: OpenAIDevs
top_tweets.name: OpenAI Developers
top_tweets.summary_zh: OpenAI 發布 GPT-Realtime-2 語音應用開發指南，涵蓋推理強度調整、前導設計、工具行為、模糊音訊處理、實體捕捉與長對話狀態管理等實務技巧。

top_tweets.text:

Categories covered:
- Agentic architecture and orchestration
- Tool design and MCP https://t.co/AJLk4Rdd3n
top_tweets.author: dani_avila7
top_tweets.name: Daniel San
top_tweets.summary_zh: 取得 Anthropic 首個技術認證「Claude Certified Architect」，涵蓋企業級應用的代理架構與編排、工具設計與 MCP 等生產環境實務。

top_tweets.text: REMINDER: If the SAVE Act passes, you will NEED a passport to vote or multiple other proof of citizenship documents. This is all by design.
top_tweets.author: GeauxGabrielle
top_tweets.name: g.
top_tweets.summary_zh: 政治議題，與產品設計/PM 無關，應排除。

top_tweets.text: We experienced an outage at Coinbase last night, which is never acceptable. The root cause was a room overheating in an AWS datacenter when multiple chillers failed. We design our services to be redundant to downtime in any one AWS Availability Zone (AZ), and most of our systems
top_tweets.author: brian_armstrong
top_tweets.name: Brian Armstrong
top_tweets.summary_zh: Coinbase 執行長說明服務中斷原因為 AWS 機房過熱（冷卻系統故障），雖設計有跨可用區冗餘但仍受影響。提醒產品團隊基礎設施韌性設計的重要性。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容

top_products.title: Sendly
top_products.author: Sarang
top_products.summary_zh: 為 AI Agent 與開發者提供的簞訊發送服務，讓 AI 系統能夠透過 SMS 與使用者溝通。

top_products.title: KodHau
top_products.author: Zhasulan Serikbek
top_products.tagline: Stop your AI from breaking prod-give it your team decisions
top_products.summary_zh: 協助開發團隊將決策紀錄提供給 AI 工具，避免 AI 在生產環境中做出錯誤變更。

top_products.title: Fabraix
top_products.author: Sharath Kuruganty
top_products.tagline: Find gaps in your AI agents before users do
top_products.summary_zh: 在使用者發現問題之前，協助開發者測試並找出 AI Agent 的缺陷與漏洞。

top_products.title: Monid 2.0
top_products.author: Shengkun Ye
top_products.summary_zh: 類似 OpenRouter 的服務，專注於整合與管理各種 AI Agent 工具的存取介面。

top_products.title: SecureLend Agents
top_products.author: Tobias Pfütze
top_products.tagline: AI underwriting agents for VCs, lenders and insurers
top_products.summary_zh: 為創投、貸款機構與保險公司提供的 AI 核保代理工具，自動化審核與風險評估流程。

top_products.title: Bitfield
top_products.author: Jibran Akhtar
top_products.tagline: No AI spaghetti code. Agents read state in under 1ns
top_products.summary_zh: 透過高效能狀態讀取技術（1 奈秒以內），讓 AI Agent 程式碼保持簡潔而非雜亂無章。
